data.title: Michael Burry's Hedge Fund Could Soar if China Cuts Interest Rates in 2025
data.description: Michael Burry's $196 million hedge fund, Scion Asset Management, could see hefty gains if the People's Bank of China cuts interest rates in 2025, which it has suggested it is likely to do.

data.title: Dogecoin Whales Accumulate Nearly 1 Billion DOGE in Two Days After Elon Musk's Crypto Forecast
data.description: Whales have amassed almost 1 billion Dogecoin (CRYPTO: DOGE) within a span of 48 hours.

data.title: In Joe Rogan Interview, Zuckerberg Expresses Confidence in Trump's Support for Tech Sector: 'I Think He Just Wants America to Win'
data.description: In his Friday appearance on Joe Rogan's podcast, Mark Zuckerberg voiced his optimism regarding President-elect Trump's support for the American tech industry.

data.title: FDA Approves Weight-loss Drug Zepbound For Sleep Apnea – Will Insurance Cover This $1000-Per-Month Medication?
Trump Faces Crucial Weekend Meeting as SALT Caucus Demands Change To Tax Deduction Cap and Threatens To Withhold Support
data.description: A group of Republicans is threatening to block President-elect Trump's tax reform agenda unless the controversial State and Local Tax (SALT) deduction cap is addressed.
